rd300.label: Position-seeded validation ratings with RD 300
rd300.warning: Higher RD reduces but does not eliminate shared-prior circularity.

no_position.label: No-position-seed game ratings
no_position.warning: Independent of the position prior but noisier for low-game configurations.

historical_sensitivity.warning: Historical, pre-stratification depth-10 sensitivity only; not current-contract validation.
